title: Credit conditions - Bank of Canada
content:
To meet its mandate, the Bank carefully monitors changes in credit conditions, the money supply, financial system liquidity, and other credit-market indicators. This information reflects changes in the economy, the influence of monetary policy, and financial market conditions.
See Selected credit measures (formerly E2) .

### Total business credit and components
See Selected credit measures (formerly E2) .

### Asset-backed commercial paper
See Corporate and other short-term paper outstanding (formerly F2) .

### Total bond issuances (v111900655)
See Capital markets activities: Gross new issues, retirements and net new issue of securities (formerly F4-F10) .
Note: The breakdown of total bond issuances is no longer available.
See Selected monetary aggregates and their components (formerly E1) .

## Financial indicators

### Housing Affordability Index
See Indicators of Capacity and Inflation Pressures for Canada, Real Estate Market .

### Business Outlook Survey data
See Business Outlook Survey .

### Senior Loan Officer Survey data
See Senior Loan Officer Survey .

### Measures of Wholesale Bank Funding Costs
As of March 22, 2018, the Bank of Canada no longer publishes this data.

### Trends in Key Interest Rates
See Canadian Interest Rates and Monetary Policy Variables: 10-year Lookup .

### Weekly Effective Interest Rates
See Canadian Interest Rates and Monetary Policy Variables: 10-year Lookup .
